title: RENAINF case state machine and penalty/appeal ordering
statement: RENAINF transactional endpoints enforce the infraction case state machine (RASCUNHO → … → PENALIDADE_IMPOSTA → … → DECISAO_FINAL/ARQUIVADO) and business rules RENAINF.R001–R012. Penalty may be imposed only after autuação and preliminary-defense handling; JARI appeal must precede second-instance appeal; a defense/appeal references a single AIT/case; only legitimate actors (proprietário, condutor identificado, representante legal) may submit. Violations yield 402 with the domain code; unknown AIT/case yields 404; malformed AIT fields yield 400.
rationale: The infraction lifecycle has strict ordering and legitimacy rules; a faithful mock must reject out-of-order penalties and appeals so consumers test the real administrative flow.
